name: @okcontract/cells
description: Simplified reactive functional programming for the web

scripts.build: bun run format && bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/cells.js --target browser --format esm --minify && bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/cells.umd.cjs --target browser --format cjs --minify
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun test && bun run build && bun run check && bun run definitions

author: Henri Binsztok
